author: Yannick Croissant
body:
* fix(defaultsPure): don't change keys order, fix algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#761 (#762) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/e321896b2ec4ccf5bc0ab297d8572979e20787d7, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/761 https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/762
 * fix(types): add  state method (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#773) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/b8ebc1567366519beb76e78a1d065bf3aa30dc3f
 * fix(typescript): fix TypeScript 3.9 compatibility (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#775) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/a7b23a541bfbe6c0cb985271ec1b93a2f310e627, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/775 https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/774
